title: basilaea regia
intro: Basilaea regia, also known as the "Royal Basil," is a lesser-known species of the Basil genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of eugenol, a natural compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The medicinal properties of Basilaea regia contribute to its health benefits, including pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved digestion. Basilaea regia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils for various medicinal uses.
